Through original programming, documentaries, and expert-led discussions, MHTN aims to increase awareness, provide valuable information, and encourage open conversations about mental well-being.

programme.title: Quo Vadis TV
programme.desc: Quo Vadis TV is committed to sharing the Biblical message in a way that makes Christian living practical, realistic, and attainable. Our theme is summarized the question: "where are you going?" Our Aim with this inquiry is to help people find orientation and find the path back to God.

Our theme is summarized the question: "where are you going?" Our Aim with this inquiry is to help people find orientation and find the path back to God.

programme.title: Salome
programme.desc: Princess Salome (Rita Hayworth) is the daughter of King Herod (Charles Laughton) of Galilee. Cast out after her affair with Caesar's nephew, Salome finds herself back in the kingdom of her father when she falls in love with Claudius (Stewart Granger), the commander of her father's army. Meanwhile, Salome's evil mother, Queen Herodias, is continually being condemned by John the Baptist, and plotting to use Salome as a tool to get the prophet executed.

programme.title: Samson and Delilah
programme.desc: Samson (Victor Mature), the hero of the Israelites, wins the hand of a Philistine woman, Semadar (Angela Lansbury), in a contest of strength. When she is killed during a conflict on her wedding night, however, Samson becomes a hunted man whom the Philistines, including Semadar's sister, Delilah (Hedy Lamarr), want to punish. This becomes complicated, however, when Samson suddenly acquires God-given superpowers, and Delilah's true feelings for Samson surface.

programme.title: Barabbas
programme.desc: Epic biblical tale about the criminal who was released by Pontius Pilate in preference to Jesus, prior to the Crucifixion. The action follows Barabbas after his lucky escape, his return to crime and his subsequent recapture and imprisonment in the sulfur mines. Based on the novel by Swedish writer Par Lagerkvist.

programme.title: David and Bathsheba

programme.desc: Eminent psychiatrist Dr. Brenner (Erwin Kalser) invites cartoonist Bill Harrison (Allyn Joslyn) and his wife, Jack (Evelyn Keyes), to a banquet honoring war refugees. Bill volunteers to pick up fellow psychiatrist Dr. Baumler at the train station, but the man vanishes when he has Bill stop so he can use a pay phone. At the dinner, Bill and Jack are seated with Brenner's daughter, Freda (Nina Foch), and, to Bill's surprise, another man is introduced as Baumler -- who dies moments later.

programme.title: One Foot in Heaven
programme.desc: After hearing an evangelist preach, William Spence (Fredric March) abandons his dream of becoming a doctor in favor of studying for the clergy. Once ordained, he and his new wife, Hope (Martha Scott), begin a series of moves from one small-town church to another, each with a new set of challenges, not the least of which is the general orneriness of their parishioners. Along the way, they have three children, and William gradually becomes more flexible about church doctrine.

programme.title: Breaker Morant
programme.desc: In South Africa during the Second Boer War, Australian Army Lieutenants Harry "Breaker" Morant (Edward Woodward), Peter Handcock (Bryan Brown) and George Witton (Lewis Fitz-Gerald) stand accused of the murders of six Boer prisoners and the assassination of a German missionary. British Commander-in-Chief Lord Kitchener is determined to see the men found guilty, which he can use as a bargaining chip in an impending peace conference with the Boers.

programme.desc: Hell-bent on revenge, flinty gunslinger Bart Allison (Randolph Scott) rides into a sleepy Western town with one goal in mind: to kill local roughneck Tate Kimbrough (John Carroll), who kidnapped his wife years ago. Both men have blood on their hands over the woman's eventual suicide. Allison and Kimbrough, wracked with guilt but boiling over with bloodlust, are set to face off for one final confrontation. Tensions mount as sunset approaches, and the townspeople must choose sides.

programme.title: Taggart
programme.desc: Kent Taggart's family members, with their cattle stampeded, are killed by those who started it. In a fair gunfight, he kills the man's son responsible for it, and when he runs, a warrant is issued and a price is put on his head.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Sgt. Joe Friday (Jack Webb) and Officer Frank Smith (Ben Alexander) are Los Angeles Police Department detectives, and they need every bit of skill they have to solve their latest case: the shooting death of low-end bookie Miller Starkie. While initial evidence points to gangster Max Troy (Stacy Harris) and his trigger-man, Chester Davitt, Friday and Smith have trouble getting an indictment. Only through their own tenaciousness can they make sure justice is served.

programme.title: Fauda
programme.desc: After retiring from the Israel Defense Force, Doron is working on a vineyard. He gets roped back into active duty, though, upon learning that an enemy who Doron thought his unit had killed is still alive and plans on attending his brother's wedding. Doron rejoins the IDF team with the intention of going under cover at the wedding, but the plan goes awry when the team's cover is blown. That sets into motion a chaotic chain of events and leads IDF into a manhunt to locate and kill the squad's target.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Ben Cartwright is the patriarch of an all-male Nevada ranching family. Set during and after the Civil War, "Bonanza" is the story of life on the family's thousand-acre spread, known as the Ponderosa, near Virginia City. Ben has his three sons, each with a different (and deceased) mother. Serious eldest son Adam hopes to follow in his father's footsteps; middle son Hoss is a gentle giant -- physically strong, but sometimes naive; and youngest son Little Joe is the most impetuous and romantic of the offspring.

programme.desc: From politics and policy to tech and trends, Yvonne Man and David Ingles give global investors insight into the world's second-biggest economy, delivering in-depth discussions with newsmakers.

programme.title: Insight With Haslinda Amin
programme.desc: The definitive guide for global news audiences to get the complete picture on the story of the day, through probing interviews and nuanced conversations.

programme.title: Bloomberg Horizons Middle East & Africa
programme.desc: A spotlight on the fast paced growth and major deals happening across the Middle East and Africa, linking the market drivers from overnight in the U.S. and across Asia into the region's trading day, with deep-dive analysis of the top businesses.

programme.title: Bloomberg Daybreak: Europe
programme.desc: From London, essential morning viewing to stay ahead of the day's market trends with news stories from the U.S. and Asia in the lead-up to the opening of European markets.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: S01 E21 Spanish Grant A former dance hall girl poses as a Spanish heiress to claim a land grant that includes part of the Ponderosa; guest Sebastian Cabot.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S05 E20 End of the Hunt Lucas' lust for revenge nearly ruins his life.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S05 E21 The Bullet Lucas uses a bullet as evidence to convict a crooked gambler.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S05 E22 Requiem at Mission Springs Mark is injured in an accident that leaves his legs paralyzed.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S05 E23 The Guest A stranger arrives on the McCain ranch claiming to be a friend of Lucas'.

programme.title: Suddenly
programme.desc: In advance of a presidential visit to the small town of Suddenly, California, a trio of FBI agents enters the Benson family's home to assess potential security risks. Once inside, leader John Baron (Frank Sinatra) reveals himself as a psychopathic assassin, and he kidnaps the family in order to use their house as his vantage point in his plot to kill the president. Sheriff Tod Shaw (Sterling Hayden) matches wits with the assassin and his gang in an attempt to save the day.

programme.title: The Tall Tales of Jim Bridger
programme.desc: S01 E09 The Fossil Feud When bloodthirsty Canadian trappers try to kill him, mountain man Jim Bridger takes cover in an unexplored valley; he runs headlong into a family of escaped slaves who show him the huge footprints and fossilized bones of long-dead monsters.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S04 E24 Tinhorn Lucas' friends label him a tinhorn because of his gambling.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S04 E25 None So Blind A blind banjo-playing wanderer strikes up an acquaintance with Mark.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S04 E26 The Jealous Man The McCains get new neighbors when a couple moves into a nearby ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S04 E27 Guilty Conscience A Southern belle arrives in North Fork claiming that Micah is her husband.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S04 E07 Elijah Briant and the Wild Bunch When Elijah Briant is elected sheriff, the mild-mannered druggist and former teacher tries to enforce the law without carrying a weapon; he soon faces a serious challenge when the last surviving members of the Wild Bunch descend on his town.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S04 E08 El Bandito Vasquez When an elusive bandito terrorizes early Los Angeles County, a reporter shadows the sheriff who is hunting the outlaw; it will be seen if the reporter can stay objective or takes matters into his own hands when he comes face to face with the killer.

programme.title: The Tall Tales of Jim Bridger
programme.desc: S01 E01 The Prizefighter When Jim Bridger's second-in-command begins enforcing camp discipline with brutal violence, one trapper pushes back, and a showdown seems inevitable.

programme.title: The Tall Tales of Jim Bridger
programme.desc: S01 E10 A Shard of Glass Haunted by the memory of leaving a man to die, mountain man Jim Bridger is determined not to repeat the mistake; when his trapping party runs out of water while crossing a barren desert, Bridger struggles desperately to keep his companions alive.

programme.title: The Young Riders
programme.desc: S01 E20 Matched Pair A former teacher instigates a potentially deadly confrontation between Hickok and a "friendly" adversary.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: S02 E05 The Hopefuls Outlaws plot to steal a trunk containing the savings of a religious group heading for a new life in the West.

programme.title: An Eye for an Eye
programme.desc: Ex-bounty hunter Talion (Robert Lansing) comes home one day to find his house ablaze and his entire family slaughtered. He soon learns that the culprits are a gang led by nasty Ike Slant (Slim Pickens). While tracking the outlaws, Talion meets fellow bounty hunter Benny (Pat Wayne), who's also after Ike. Initially mistrustful of each another, Benny and Talion are forced to work together when, during a shootout with the criminals, the latter is blinded and the former injures his shooting hand.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: S03 E05 True Grits The cowboys look for a secretary to help them get organized; Bubba and Kaley plan Andie's first birthday party; Booger tries to repurchase his grandpa's land; Cody is excited about their restaurant venture, but the chef disapproves of his dishes.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: S03 E06 Man Up The cowboys help a rancher remove dangerous cattle from his property; Booger begins to train Bubba's new colt; Chef Bill insists that the guys get more personal training prior to opening their restaurant; Cody helps Misty with her new cattle pens.

programme.title: Shootout
programme.desc: An ex-gunman is torn between his obsession with revenge and his responsibility to a 6-year-old girl and a lonely widow.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: S02 E07 Day of Reckoning Bigoted Ike Daggett takes action when Ben gives an Indian and his wife land after the Indian saves his life.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: S02 E08 The Abduction Hoss and Little Joe spend the most unforgettable night at the carnival when Little Joe's date disappears.

programme.title: The Big Trees
programme.desc: Corrupt Wisconsin lumberman Jim Fallon (Kirk Douglas) travels to Northern California at the dawn of the 20th century in order to gain control of a tract of redwood forest. Fallon's underhanded tactics stir resentment from everyone, including settler Elder Bixby (Charles Meredith) ; his beautiful daughter, Alicia (Eve Miller) ; Fallon's fair-minded employee, Yukon Burns (Edgar Buchanan) ; and his right-hand man, Frenchy LeCroix (John Archer) -- and his cheating ways create unlikely bedfellows.

programme.title: The Tall Tales of Jim Bridger
programme.desc: S01 E02 They Killed Me Frontiersman Jim Bridger tells a group of settlers a story claiming he was once killed by warriors, yet somehow lived to tell the tale; they think he's joking, but Bridger soon proves that he really did rise from the dead.

programme.title: The Tall Tales of Jim Bridger
programme.desc: S01 E05 Brothers in Arms Jim Bridger and a lone Shoshone brave must overcome their suspicions and learn to trust each other when they are ambushed by a Blackfeet war party.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S01 E01 The Sharpshooter Lucas and Mark McCain settle near North Fork.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S01 E02 Home Ranch Two tough hired hands beat up Lucas and burn his ranch to get him to move off his land.

programme.title: Vengeance Valley
programme.desc: Adopted by the wealthy rancher Arch Strobie, orphan Owen Daybright (Burt Lancaster) grows to be a respectable foreman on Strobie's ranch. Strobie's natural son, Lee (Robert Walker), is jealous of Owen and finally finds a way to undermine his upstanding brother. When Lee conceives an illegitimate child with Lily Fasken (Sally Forrest), who refuses to name him as the father, he tells her revenge-minded brothers that Owen is to blame, hoping they'll take his half-brother out of the picture.

programme.title: The Gun and the Pulpit
programme.desc: After narrowly escaping a lynch mob, atheist gunslinger Ernie Parsons (Marjoe Gortner) steals the identity of a murdered preacher and takes his job in a western town. Ernie falls for the beautiful Sally Underwood (Pamela Sue Martin) and becomes attached to the town he's come to think of as his sanctuary. So when his new home is threatened by a tyrannical land baron, Ernie must use both his extensive skills as a gunfighter and his minimal skills as a preacher to defend the townspeople.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S01 E17 The Retired Gun Outlaws hunt a retired gunfighter who has settled in North Fork.

programme.desc: S02 E23 That's Show Biz A rock 'n' roll group threatens to lure Agarn away from F Troop.

programme.title: The Last Days of Frank and Jesse James
programme.desc: The outlaw brothers (Kris Kristofferson, Johnny Cash) go from the Civil War to robbing trains to farming under assumed names.

programme.title: My Name Is Nobody
programme.desc: An anonymous gunfighter (Terence Hill) follows a retired outlaw (Henry Fonda) from Santa Fe to New Orleans for one last shootout.

programme.title: Once Upon a Texas Train
programme.desc: Outlaw John Henry Lee (Willie Nelson) and his gang are bank robbers tearing through Texas. When their next heist is on a train, Lee's freedom comes to an end when Capt. Owen Hayes (Richard Widmark) of the Texas Rangers catches the thief red-handed. Released after 20 years, Lee wastes no time picking up where he left off -- which pushes Hayes to come out of retirement to catch his man again. But Hayes is not the only one after Lee when a young bandit (Shaun Cassidy) targets the old crook.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: S07 E01 Saddle Up, Partner The cowboys' roping skills are tested when they help a friend catch some wild hogs; Bubba and Kaley throw a gender reveal party for their new baby; Booger looks for new opportunities in Florida; Cody surprises Misty with blueprints for a new home.

programme.desc: S04 E28 Day of Reckoning Lucas regrets his attitude toward a reformed outlaw.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S04 E29 The Day a Town Slept The new marshal is friends with a known outlaw.

programme.title: Red Headed Stranger
programme.desc: The Rev. Shay (Willie Nelson) moves out West to set up his new home in Montana so that he can spread God's word. But when his wife, Raysha (Morgan Fairchild), leaves him for another man -- in part because she wants to return to Philadelphia -- the reverend decides to replace his spiritual ways with a gun. After shooting down his wife and her lover, he battles a landowner intent on keeping all of the town's water for himself. But his deadly ways make him yearn for a belief in God again.

programme.title: The Legend of 5 Mile Cave
programme.desc: In 1929 a mysterious stranger renting a room on a widow's farm shares tales of the Old West with her young son. As they bond, the boy realizes the man knows a little too much about a gold robbery, and his secret may save the farm.

programme.desc: The latest breaking national and international news.

programme.title: Fine Point With Chanel Rion
programme.desc: Chanel Rion leads bold and uncensored discourse on Big Tech, Big Media, and Big Government. From thought leaders to world leaders, join Chanel as she pierces through the scripts, and reads between the lies. Weeknights on OAN.

programme.title: Real America With Dan Ball
programme.desc: Dan Ball brings the political headlines by interviewing news makers of the day, including politicians, lawmakers, pundits, celebrities and social media influencers.

programme.title: The Matt Gaetz Show

programme.title: The Real Story With Riley Lewis

programme.title: After Hours with John Hines
programme.desc: It seems every single day there's a year's worth of headlines. John Hines helps distinguish what's news from noise.

programme.title: The Anchormen Show

programme.title: My Classic Car
programme.desc: Dennis Gage travels across America to various auto shows and events to discover and care for everything from muscle cars to museum pieces.

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ

programme.title: Sam's Garage

programme.title: Those Magnificent Men...
programme.desc: ...in Their Flying Machines: (1965) Newspaper boss Robert Morley puts up a £10,000 prize for the winner of a flight from London to Paris, and soon a motley assortment of aviators is ready.

programme.title: Sister Act
programme.desc: (1992) Comedy starring Whoopi Goldberg. A casino singer who witnesses a Mob murder goes into hiding at a convent, where she soon has the choir rocking. With Maggie Smith.

programme.title: A Few Good Men
programme.desc: (1992) High-stakes courtroom drama with more than a few good actors, including Jack Nicholson, Demi Moore and Tom Cruise. Can a lackadaisical naval lawyer crack a battle-hardened colonel?

programme.title: The Green Mile

programme.title: Smokey and the Bandit
programme.desc: Comedy crime caper film starring Burt Reynolds and Sally Field, 1977. A legendary truck driver is hired to transport an illegal beer shipment from Texas to Georgia within 28 hours.

programme.title: Junk and Disorderly
programme.desc: Henry Cole, Allen Millyard and Guy Willison revamp their stall after picking up a vanload of trinkets and set their sights on a big sale at a mega jumble held by Sammy Miller. S3 Ep4

programme.title: English Football League Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the day's games in the Football League, including Millwall v Norwich, Ipswich v Birmingham, Swansea v Middlesbrough and Hull v Coventry in the Championship.

programme.title: Lost
programme.desc: Homecoming: American drama following the survivors of a plane crash. Jack and Locke formulate a plan of defence when Claire returns with no memory of what has happened recently. S1 Ep15

programme.title: Lost
programme.desc: Outlaws: Secrets are divulged as Kate joins Sawyer in the hunt for a boar he insists is stalking him. Hurley and Sayid worry about Charlie's mental health. S1 Ep16

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Second Hand Pose: Drama series. After being left in an industrial freezer, Terry looks for alternative employment and gets work helping out in the second-hand furniture business. S5 Ep5

programme.title: Auto Mundial
programme.desc: The latest news and reviews from the world of cars.

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Motorsport Mundial
programme.desc: This programme brings you up to date with the latest action from the world of motorsport and features race coverage, insights, and behind-the-scenes footage from the best series.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: The Best of the 70s
programme.desc: A look back at the wide variety of sports covered by ITV during the 1970s - from horse racing to table football and Formula One to darts - that includes many memorable moments.

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: Brother Hood: Adventure series. A reclusive industrial magnate offers an assignment to Harry that involves the engineering of his brother's escape from a Mediterranean island prison. S1 Ep2

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: LA: When Robin sends Thomas on a business trip to Los Angeles, the PI meets a comedian who is promptly murdered and accidentally proposes to a woman. S7 Ep1

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Around the Corner: Comedy-drama series. Arthur's luck seems to be going to the dogs when he buys a dodgy greyhound and gets conned over some bent videos. S5 Ep9

programme.title: English Football League Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the day's games in the Football League, including Millwall v Norwich, Ipswich v Birmingham, Swansea v Middlesbrough and Hull v Coventry in the Championship.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Big Spender: Regan and Carter are on a surveillance job watching a notorious gang of hijackers who have managed to avoid conviction when they uncover a lucrative car-parking fraud. S1 Ep11

programme.title: BattleBots
programme.desc: Clash of the Champions: US robot combat series. A violent Main Event sees fifth series champion End Game takes on 2019 runner-up Witch Doctor in a clash of the vertical spinners. S6 Ep10

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: One Picture Is Worth: Classic US action drama series. Thomas agrees to protect - but then lets slip away unnoticed - a deaf artist who witnessed four murders during a bank robbery. S7 Ep2

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: I Was Happy Where I Was: Classic US detective drama. A Puerto Rican cop goes undercover in his old neighbourhood to investigate reports of an extortion racket and uncovers a scheme. S4 Ep18

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Cab Ranks Cowboys: Classic drama. Ken discovers that it is hard to find a cab when you need one, and particularly so when a thief has exactly the same idea as you. S6 Ep9

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Sharpe's Gold: Napoleonic War-based action-adventure. Summer 1813 - an angry Sharpe goes in search of British infantrymen who failed to prevent a French retreat from a recent battle. S3 Ep1

programme.title: Underwater Grand Fishing Adventure
programme.desc: Ali Hamidi is joined by angling buddy Roo Abbott and diver Luc Boerrigter at Chase Lakes in France as they try to catch a carp in front of underwater cameras. S1 Ep1

programme.title: The Motorbike Show
programme.desc: Henry's Mediterranean odyssey continues with a ride through southern Spain, the restoration of the 1970 Chopper gathers pace, and Henry gets a sneak peek at the latest AJS models. S9 Ep2

programme.title: The 1% Club
programme.desc: Lee Mack hosts another episode of the logic and common sense-based game show - 100 contestants will start, but who will make it to the end to try to win up to 100,000 pounds?

programme.title: Rocky II
programme.desc: Boxing drama film sequel starring Sylvester Stallone and Carl Weathers, 1979. Rocky is struggling with family life after fighting Apollo Creed when he is goaded into a rematch.

programme.title: Minder

programme.title: Hope and Health With Mathew Embry
programme.desc: Retired anesthesiologist Bill Code about living with multiple sclerosis for nearly three decades. Diagnosed in 1996, Bill shares how his medical background and personal experience shaped his long-term approach to managing MS. The conversation explores hyperbaric oxygen therapy, omega-3 supplementation, the microvascular theory of MS, and the role of blood flow and cellular energy in neurological health.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: When a scout from the Battle of the Little Big Horn tries to blackmail Gen. Custer's widow, she fears he plans to provide damaging testimony at an upcoming hearing for Maj. Reno; Earp must convince her that her husband was a courageous man.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Unscrupulous businessman Moresby, seeking a way to permanently cripple Earp, convinces a boxing promoter to have his champ beat Earp, but the marshal refuses to take up the challenge until the champ's blatant cheating injures a young man in the ring.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Earp begins dating Mrs. Phillips, a widowed seamstress, but fears for her safety as word arrives in Dodge City that a convict Earp helped put away has escaped and wants revenge.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp

programme.desc: In this weekly program, Dr. David Jeremiah delivers practical messages to the congregation at the Shadow Mountain Community Church in San Diego. programme.title: Lawless Range
programme.desc: Rodeo man John Middleton (John Wayne) is called upon for a favor by Hank Mason (Wally Howe), a friend of the Middletons who lives in a nearby town. But, when John arrives at Hank's, the man's niece, Ann (Sheila Mannors), informs him that Hank has been abducted. John then teams up with the local sheriff, takes on a disguise and begins investigating cattle rustlers who could be connected to the disappearance. He's led to a corrupt banker (Frank McGlynn Jr.), who has plans to take over the town.

programme.title: The Carson City Kid
programme.desc: The Carson City Kid (Roy Rogers) stops stagecoaches traveling between Wild West mining towns, searching their mail sacks for letters addressed to Morgan Reynolds, the man who killed his brother. Discovering that Reynolds operates a saloon under the name Lee Jessup (Bob Steele), the Kid takes a job as the saloon's bouncer. While vying with Reynolds for the affections of singer Joby Madison (Pauline Moore), the Kid discovers a swindled miner (Noah Beery Jr.) who claims to be the Carson City Kid.

programme.title: The Ranger and the Lady
programme.desc: A Texas Ranger (Roy Rogers) and his partner (George "Gabby" Hayes) try to tax a woman's (Jacqueline Wells) wagon train on the Santa Fe Trail.

programme.title: Think Big
programme.desc: Children are the future -- and so are their inventions, which is why "Think Big" could be an important show. It features young inventors competing to see who can come up with the most-innovative invention. Each episode features two teams in the Think Tank -- a studio filled with art supplies and construction materials -- who brainstorm and choose materials before sketching, designing and building a prototype to be presented to a judge, who determines a winner. The champions earn bragging rights and the coveted Genius Cup.

programme.title: Biz Kids
programme.desc: Teaching financial education and entrepreneurship to a preteen audience; sketch comedy and young actors help explain basic economic concepts.

programme.title: Sports Stars of Tomorrow
programme.desc: Profiles of the top rookie, college and high-school talent in sports; current athletes share their experiences, advice and personal impressions of the road to stardom.

programme.title: America's Heartland
programme.desc: Much of the food Americans eat is produced by farmers and ranchers in the country's heartland, but many people don't know how it's produced. "America's Heartland" provides information about the people and processes responsible for the availability of food and fuel across the country and around the world. The show's reporters and producers tell stories in topics that include farm families, consumer issues, animal welfare and crop sustainability. Some episodes also take the show abroad to countries such as Egypt and Taiwan to show the impact American agriculture has on the global economy.

programme.desc: Ben tries to help his paraplegic neighbor Tom by setting up a grain mill on his unused land; Tom's hired hand raises his suspicion about Ben's plan.
